title: The Merchant???
description: A mysterious merchant has set up shop. You can purchase relics from their inventory.
conditions: Requires at least 100 Gold OR a Foul Potion
notes: This is an interactive merchant encounter, not a traditional choice event. The merchant offers up to 6 randomly selected relics from a pool of 9 possibilities (Fake Anchor, Fake Blood Vial, Fake Happy Flower, Fake Lee's Waffle, Fake Mango, Fake Orichalcum, Fake Snecko Eye, Fake Strike Dummy, Fake Venerable Tea Set). Each relic costs [gold]50 Gold[/gold]. If you throw a [purple]Foul Potion[/purple] at the merchant, you enter combat with the [gold][b]Fake Merchant[/b][/gold]. If you defeat them, you receive [yellow]Fake Merchant's Rug[/yellow] and any relics still in their inventory.
